---
title: "REPLACE WITH THE ARTICLE TITLE"
date: "YYYY-MM-DD"                       # original publish date
categories: [Health Financing]          # pick from the controlled list below
image: "images/cover.jpg"               # drop a cover image into this post's images/ folder
description: "One-sentence hook shown on the homepage card and in search."
# author defaults to "Matthew Kuch" (set here only to override, e.g. a guest author)
---

<!--
================  HOW TO USE THIS TEMPLATE  ================
1. Copy this whole folder pattern: posts/<your-slug>/  with index.qmd + images/
2. Replace the front-matter above (keep the quotes).
3. Paste the LinkedIn article text BELOW this comment block.
4. Tidy the pasted text using the cheatsheet below.

Controlled category list (use one or more, exact spelling):
  Health Financing | Global Health | Political Economy |
  Tax & Domestic Resource Mobilisation | Vaccines & Immunisation |
  Maternal & Child Health | Grants Management | Trade & Supply Chains |
  Data & Methods

LinkedIn -> Markdown cheatsheet:
  • Leave a BLANK LINE between paragraphs (Markdown needs it).
  • A heading line  ->  ## My Heading
  • A bullet point   ->  - my point
  • A quote / callout ->  > the quoted text
  • A link           ->  [visible text](https://the-url)
  • An image         ->  ![caption](images/the-file.jpg)   (put file in images/)
  • A literal dollar sign must be written  \$  (a bare $ turns on math mode)
===========================================================
-->

Opening paragraph / hook goes here.

## First section

Body text...

> Optional pull-quote from the article.

## Second section

Body text...

## References

- Author, Year. *Title*. Source. Available at: [url](https://url) [Accessed DD Month YYYY].
